title: viola striatella
intro: Viola striatella, commonly known as the small yellow pansy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the viola genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola striatella include alleviating symptoms of asthma, reducing fever, and providing relief from anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
